description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed sword with a pointed tip and a symmetrical, double-edged design. The blade is dark, possibly black or deep purple, and appears to have a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The handle is elongated and contoured for grip, with a subtle pommel at the end and a simple crossguard separating the blade from the handle. The entire object is monochromatic, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements. The sword's proportions suggest it is designed for one-handed or possibly two-handed use, with a balanced and functional appearance. The overall construction appears to be metallic, giving it a sturdy and durable look suitable for practical or ceremonial use.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a dark, smooth blade and a contoured handle, separated by a simple crossguard. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight, pointed blade and the symmetrical crossguard and handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's narrowness.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the straight blade and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_design: contoured, straight, smooth, dark material, subtle pommel
